ec2.carriergateway.CfnAbout: Creates a carrier gateway. For more information about carrier gateways, see [Carrier gateways](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/wavelength/latest/developerguide/how-wavelengths-work.html

ec2.carriergateway.Tags.Description: The tags assigned to the carrier gateway.

ec2.carriergateway.VpcId.Description: The ID of the VPC associated with the carrier gateway.
